title: 苹果名词编码的表达力-性能平衡分析

cross_model_summary.core_answer: 苹果之所以既能有足够表达力又能保持高性能，更像是因为它不是被完全单独编码，而是复用了共享名词底座与类别偏置，再通过较小但结构化的上下文增量完成语义切换。

apple_fruit_cases.sentence: I ate an apple after lunch.
The apple tasted sweet and crisp.
She sliced the apple into thin pieces.
A red apple rolled off the table.

apple_brand_cases.sentence: Apple released a new laptop this year.
Many developers build apps for Apple devices.
Apple announced a faster chip for its computers.
Investors watched Apple after the earnings call.
